reviews.comment:
Buen día! Quiero comunicar a la población de itaibate y su respectivo dueño que el encargado y demás empleados de la YPF en ruta 12 son unos agresivos eh irrespetuoso! Dejan mal a la empresa, esta gente no cuida el trabajo, que el dueño tome medidas xq evidentemente no es la primera vez que pasa, hay muchas quejas! Alguien es tan amable de ponerme en contacto con el dueño ? Muchas gracias y cuidado con estas personas

(Translated by Google)
Good day! I want to inform the residents of Itaibate and its owner that the manager and other employees of the YPF station on Route 12 are aggressive and disrespectful! They give the company a bad name; these people don't value their jobs. The owner needs to take action because this is clearly not the first time this has happened—there are many complaints! Could someone please put me in touch with the owner? Thank you very much, and be careful with these people.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10294682495924088484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURXeHB5dFJnEAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención. Únicos inconvenientes, los baños con poca higiene y poco espacios (mesa y sillas) para descansar...

(Translated by Google)
Good service. The only drawbacks were the bathrooms, which weren't very clean, and the lack of space (table and chairs) to relax.

reviewReply.comment: Muchas gracias por valorar nuestro servicio José Luis, esperamos vuelva pronto a visitarnos. Saludos cordiales. Equipo ACA Ita Ibaté
